top_signals.title: Hyperliquid ETFs attract record $25.5 million in net inflows as institutions pile in
top_signals.summary: U.S. spot HYPE ETFs saw $25.5 million in net inflows on Wednesday, marking their largest positive flows since launch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The Works shares soar as families look for ‘screen-free’ fun
top_signals.summary: Shares in The Works soared on Thursday morning after the retailer said growing demand for “screen-free” entertainment is driving up revenue. The Aim-listed stock jumped 11 per cent on early trading, to 60p, after it reported revenue growth of more than three per cent to £260m in the year to May. The retailer saw like-for-like [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
